title: epipactis helleborine var. violacea
intro: Epipactis helleborine var. violacea, also known as Violet Helleborine or Violet Orchid, is a rare and unique variety of orchid native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Epipactis helleborine var. violacea include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Epipactis helleborine var. violacea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
